reviews.review_description: It is only a 10-15 minute movie, but some of the scenes are really really good. While I don’t think it’s worth $5 I think at $1 or maybe 2 this would be perfect if it was about half a hour i think the price would be perfect (for a full length movie of over a hour of this quality $20 would be fair) all in all I’m glad I bought it and may get others to Try it in future.

You don't watch this 3D action thriller, you are in it...

What a blast!!!
